name: Privacy Policy Section
description: Policy must contain a dedicated privacy policy section
remediation: Add a dedicated Privacy Policy section covering data subject rights

name: Data Retention Period
description: Policy must specify data retention periods
remediation: Define explicit data retention periods for all data categories

name: Access Control Policy
description: Policy must define access control rules
remediation: Add an Access Control section with role-based access definitions

name: GDPR Reference
description: Policy must reference GDPR compliance
remediation: Include explicit GDPR compliance statement and obligations

name: Incident Response Plan
description: Policy must define an incident response procedure
remediation: Add an Incident Response section with escalation procedures

name: Audit Logging Requirement
description: Policy must require audit logging of system access
remediation: Define audit logging requirements including retention of audit records

name: Employee Training Requirement
description: Policy must mandate security/compliance training
remediation: Add mandatory annual compliance training requirement for all staff

name: Encryption Policy
description: Policy must specify encryption requirements
remediation: Define encryption standards for data at rest and in transit

name: Consent Mechanism
description: Policy must describe user consent collection
remediation: Add explicit consent collection and management procedures

name: Policy Review Cycle
description: Policy must specify a review/update schedule
remediation: Add a policy review schedule (minimum annual)

name: Vendor Management
description: Policy must specify third-party vendor management standards
remediation: Define security standards and assessment procedures for third-party vendors

name: Breach Notification Timeline
description: Policy must state the timeline for breach notification
remediation: Specify the maximum timeline (e.g., 72 hours) for notifying authorities of a data breach

name: Right to Erasure
description: Policy must afford users the right to erasure (right to be forgotten)
remediation: Include provisions allowing data subjects to request deletion of their personal data

name: Data Minimization
description: Policy must adhere to the principle of data minimization
remediation: Add a statement ensuring only strictly necessary data is collected for specified purposes

name: Password Policy
description: Policy must specify strong password requirements
remediation: Define minimum password length, complexity, and rotation requirements

name: MFA Requirement
description: Policy must require Multi-Factor Authentication
remediation: Mandate the use of MFA for all system access, especially privileged accounts

name: Vulnerability Management
description: Policy must outline a vulnerability management program
remediation: Define procedures for regular vulnerability scanning and prompt patch application

name: Business Continuity
description: Policy must include a business continuity or disaster recovery plan
remediation: Add requirements for business continuity planning and regular testing

name: Data Classification
description: Policy must define a data classification schema
remediation: Create a data classification framework (e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential)

name: Whistleblower Policy
description: Policy must contain a whistleblower protection mechanism
remediation: Establish a secure, anonymous channel for employees to report compliance violations without retaliation
